mapper.sql: select g.goods_id, g.cat_id, g.name, g.subtitle, g.cover, g.description, g.price_cents, g.stock, g.sales, g.sort, g.status, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, c.name as cat_name from fish_mall_goods g left join fish_mall_category c on g.cat_id = c.cat_id
mapper.insert: insert into fish_mall_goods (cat_id, name, subtitle, cover, description, price_cents, stock, sales, sort, status, create_by, create_time) values (#{catId}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{cover}, #{description}, #{priceCents}, #{stock}, #{sales}0, #{sort}0, #{status}'0', #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_mall_goods set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where goods_id = #{goodsId}
update fish_mall_goods set stock = stock + #{qty}, update_time = sysdate() where goods_id = #{goodsId}
update fish_mall_goods set sales = sales + #{qty}, update_time = sysdate() where goods_id = #{goodsId}
mapper.delete: delete from fish_mall_goods where goods_id in #{id}
